title: Tisvollt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tisvollt''' were types of [[Tree/Legends|trees]] that grew in the [[Forest/Legends|forests]] of [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]]. The trees served as homes for the [[Karf]]s.<ref name="Outbound Flight">[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Notes and references==
